reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, la limpieza de los baños impecable. Siempre elegimos pasar por ella, la comida espectacular. Los chicos que atienden tienen toda la onda.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, impeccably clean bathrooms. We always choose to stop by, and the food is spectacular. The wait staff are incredibly cool.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar.muy buena atención. Muy surtida. Además super honestos. Mi hijo olvidó un termo (de 1°marca import.). Llamó. Y se lo guardaron hasta el mes siguiente cuando pasó

(Translated by Google)
Great place. Excellent service. Very well-stocked. Plus, they're super honest. My son forgot a thermos (a top imported brand). He called, and they kept it for him until the following month when he came back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwN3FESUt3EAE

reviews.comment:
Si bien estamos en un cotexto inflacionario, los precios son excesivos y no utilizan la app de ypf. Por otra parte no entiendo porque no son pet friendly

(Translated by Google)
Although we're in an inflationary context, the prices are excessive, and they don't use the YPF app. On the other hand, I don't understand why they aren't pet-friendly.
